run: if [ ! -f .env ]; then echo 'WARNING: .env not found. Copy .env.example to .env'; fi
if [ -z "${VIRTUAL_ENV:-}" ]; then echo 'WARNING: No Python virtualenv active. Run: python3 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate'; else echo "Virtualenv: $VIRTUAL_ENV"; fi
python3 -c "import fastapi" 2>/dev/null || echo 'WARNING: Dependencies not installed. Run: pip install -r requirements.txt'
